=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:7-4:14) TS6133: 'noError' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (6:1-6:27) TS377001: This Effect value is neither yielded nor used in an assignment. effect(floatingEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable floatingEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable floatingEffect for entire file"

[D3] (8:1-8:13) TS377001: This Effect value is neither yielded nor used in an assignment. effect(floatingEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable floatingEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable floatingEffect for entire file"

[D4] (11:9-11:19) TS6133: 'thisIsFine' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D5] (12:3-12:15) TS377001: This Effect value is neither yielded nor used in an assignment. effect(floatingEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable floatingEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable floatingEffect for entire file"

[D6] (15:19-18:3) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

[D7] (25:7-25:11) TS6133: 'main' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D8] (25:14-28:3) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

skipped by default

skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable floatingEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable floatingEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/floatingEffect.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const noError = Effect.succeed(1)

Effect.succeed("floating")

Effect.never

Effect.runPromise(Effect.gen(function*() {
  const thisIsFine = Effect.succeed(1)
  Effect.never
}))

Effect.runPromise(Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.fork)))

export function constructorFunction(this: { boot: Effect.Effect<void> }) {
  this.boot = Effect.void
  // ^- This is fine, its another way to perform an assignment
}

const main = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.exit(Effect.void)
  // ^- This is fine, returns an exit
})


=== [D8] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/floatingEffect.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const noError = Effect.succeed(1)

Effect.succeed("floating")

Effect.never

Effect.runPromise(Effect.gen(function*() {
  const thisIsFine = Effect.succeed(1)
  Effect.never
}))

Effect.runPromise(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.fork)
  // ^- This is fine, returns a fiber runtime
}))

export function constructorFunction(this: { boot: Effect.Effect<void> }) {
  this.boot = Effect.void
  // ^- This is fine, its another way to perform an assignment
}

const main = Effect.asVoid(Effect.exit(Effect.void))
